title: Eva 20 offically licensed by Funimation
wikitext:
[]: Eva 2.0 offically licensed by Funimation.             Quote Post by Nonoriri » Fri Jul 30, 2010 5:55 pm The North American anime distributor Funimation has announced at its Otakon panel on Friday that it licensed Hideaki Anno's Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance (Evangelion Shin Gekijōban: Ha) anime film, Studio DEEN's Ginmaku Hetalia - Axis Powers Paint it, White [Shiroku Nure!] anime film, and Mamoru Hosoda's Summer Wars anime film for home video.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Jul 30, 2010 6:13 pm This news, is good. Knew it would happen, but still good. Good.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Jul 30, 2010 6:13 pm I'm more glad that they got Summer Wars . I'd hate for such a masterpiece to get horrible dubbing.

[]:             Quote Post by Ardorius » Fri Jul 30, 2010 6:18 pm I wonder if they're planning on releasing 2.0 and 2.22, like they did for 1.0. I'd buy both :P

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Fri Jul 30, 2010 6:29 pm Took them long enough but better late than never. Sachi wrote: I'm more glad that they got Summer Wars . I'd hate for such a masterpiece to get horrible dubbing.

[]:             Quote Post by Nonoriri » Fri Jul 30, 2010 6:30 pm Ardorius wrote: I wonder if they're planning on releasing 2.0 and 2.22, like they did for 1.0. I'd buy both :P

[]:             Quote Post by Pcnerdjack14 » Fri Jul 30, 2010 6:34 pm Ardorius wrote: I wonder if they're planning on releasing 2.0 and 2.22, like they did for 1.0. I'd buy both :P

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Jul 30, 2010 6:37 pm skikes wrote: Masterpiece? Really? It's beautiful to look at yeah, but I found the plot and characters to be flat and formulaic. Really disapointed me.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Fri Jul 30, 2010 7:08 pm Sachi wrote: Summer Wars was Tengen Toppa Gurren Lagann meets The Girl Who Leapt Through Time meets .Hack// , and it was beautiful.

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Fri Jul 30, 2010 7:44 pm Not meets Digimon , it IS Digimon: Our War Games. Like "The object of death is the same thing" same >_>

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Fri Jul 30, 2010 7:53 pm I imagine I'll get to see Funimations' 2.0 dub when it hits cinemeas for Reelanime in a months' time. Since Summer Wars is also showing at the festival I imagine I'll get to see it dubbed as well.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Fri Jul 30, 2010 8:11 pm Taekmkm wrote: Not meets Digimon , it IS Digimon: Our War Games.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jul 30, 2010 8:19 pm Funimation has announced at its Otakon panel on Friday that it licensed Hideaki Anno's Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance (Evangelion Shin Gekijōban: Ha) anime film, [...] and Mamoru Hosoda's Summer Wars anime film for home video.

[]:             Quote Post by facespace » Fri Jul 30, 2010 9:12 pm I saw Summer Wars in subs and it was perfect. I wouldn't take advantage of the dubbed audio at all. I am excited for the theatrical release of Eva 2.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Fri Jul 30, 2010 9:42 pm EvangelionFan wrote: I imagine I'll get to see Funimations' 2.0 dub when it hits cinemeas for Reelanime in a months' time. Since Summer Wars is also showing at the festival I imagine I'll get to see it dubbed as well.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Fri Jul 30, 2010 9:57 pm Fazmotron wrote: Also, the cinema website says: Starring Megumi Hayashibara, Maaya Sakamoto, Kôichi Yamadera.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Fri Jul 30, 2010 10:59 pm Dendy website: [url]http://www.dendy.com.au/movies.asp?Type=2#M2895[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Fri Jul 30, 2010 11:25 pm Fazmotron wrote: Dendy website: [url]http://www.dendy.com.au/movies.asp?Type=2#M2895[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sat Jul 31, 2010 12:19 am So,they got it huh. This is the best new's I've heard all summer. Now,to wait.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 02 » Sat Jul 31, 2010 12:52 am Huh, I think I've seen 2.0 more than 1.0 at this point; I have two digital copies and an import dvd. My interest is already down, but this used to be the moment I've dreamed about....
